evals.prompt: Enrich this lead: John Doe at Stripe (stripe.com), LinkedIn https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe. Find and verify their work email, get a phone number, and pull company and LinkedIn details.
evals.expected_output: Runs the lead-enrichment skill end-to-end: finds an email (Hunter), verifies it (Hunter), enriches the lead (Sixtyfour), finds a phone (Sixtyfour), enriches the company (Hunter), and fetches the LinkedIn profile (Fiber), with a per-step status summary.
assertions: All six steps use rail "routed" via the SELAT Router
Steps target hunter.io, api.sixtyfour.ai, and api.fiber.ai hosts
The run cap does not exceed maxAmount 0.50
The output references both an email-finder and an email-verifier step
No 'orth' or 'orth run' command appears in the workflow

evals.prompt: Find the work email for Jane Smith at Acme (acme.com) and confirm it is deliverable.
evals.expected_output: Uses the Hunter Email Finder step (POST /hunter/email-finder) then the Hunter Email Verifier step (POST /hunter/email-verifier) from the lead-enrichment skill.
assertions: Email finder step posts to https://hunter.io/hunter/email-finder with domain, first_name, last_name
Verifier step posts to https://hunter.io/hunter/email-verifier with an email field
Both steps are routed MPP

evals.prompt: I need a phone number for Maria Lopez at Datadog.
evals.expected_output: Invokes the Sixtyfour Find Phone step (POST /find-phone) with the lead's first_name, last_name, and company.
assertions: Find-phone step posts to https://api.sixtyfour.ai/find-phone
The body includes a lead object with first_name, last_name, and company
Step maxAmount is 0.30

evals.prompt: Enrich the company at the domain figma.com.
evals.expected_output: Invokes the Hunter Company Enrichment step (POST /hunter/company-enrichment) with the domain.
assertions: Company step posts to https://hunter.io/hunter/company-enrichment with a domain field
The step is routed MPP
Step maxAmount is 0.013

evals.prompt: Pull a fresh LinkedIn profile for https://linkedin.com/in/satyanadella.
evals.expected_output: Invokes the Fiber LinkedIn live-fetch step (POST /v1/linkedin-live-fetch/profile/single) with the LinkedIn URL as identifier.
assertions: Fiber step posts to https://api.fiber.ai/v1/linkedin-live-fetch/profile/single
The body uses an identifier field set to the LinkedIn URL
Step maxAmount is 0.04

evals.prompt: Before I pay, probe the lead-enrichment endpoints to confirm they return 402.
evals.expected_output: Runs the selat-pay --probe-only commands listed in the skill Validation section against each MPP endpoint without paying.
assertions: Each probe uses selat-pay with --probe-only and --chain base
Probes cover all six endpoints (hunter email-finder, hunter email-verifier, sixtyfour enrich-lead, sixtyfour find-phone, hunter company-enrichment, fiber profile)
No payment is sent during probing
